title: BarVaryingDistributedLoad
description: BarVaryingDistributedLoad: Varying distributed load for bar elements. Can be used to apply force and/or moments.

StartPosition.description:
Distance along the bar between the start node and the start of the loaded region.
If RelativePositions is true, this value will be a normalised length where 0 means start and 1 means end, which means this value needs to be within this range.
If RelativePositions is false, this value will be in absolute distances.

EndPosition.description:
Distance along the bar between the start node and the end of the loaded region.
If RelativePositions is true, this value will be a normalised length where 0 means start and 1 means end, which means this value needs to be within this range.
If RelativePositions is false, this value will be in absolute distances.

Projected.description: If true the load is projected to the element. This means that the load will be reduced when its direction is at an angle to the element.

RelativePositions.description:
If true, the StartPosition and EndPosition will be normalised lengths where 0 means start and 1 means end.
If false, the StartPosition and EndPosition will be absolute distances.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
